items.name_cn:
In stock❗️
Goyard Beluga Basket Red♥️
The vintage large tote basket is now "born"!!
Sure enough, any bag looks cute when it shrinks🥰🥰
However, this is cute with a touch of ceremony
Because of these handles~the whole bag is elevated
Usually, the Beluga basket is open
The designer was thoughtful to add a drawstring pouch inside
A basket that can be closed gives peace of mind
I placed an order immediately after the agent posted the photo
This must be snatched up, a sure-fire hit🔥
A hit requires speed and accuracy!
Otherwise, if you clash with someone else's bag, the one with the wrong version will be awkward
Our craftsmanship needs no explanation, buy with confidence and wear with confidence!

items.name_en: In Stock🔥 Chanel 23a Haute Couture Tweed Backpack. I fell in love with this small bag at first glance. Unlike the Duma, it has no flap. The overall design feels warm and comfortable, giving the impression of gradually entering autumn. The cute detail is that the bag is mainly made of tweed texture, with a brown leather pocket at the front. Ready to ship, order now! 🤩🤩

items.name_en: Includes full original retail packaging 💖 [New] MIU vintage underarm dumpling bag, new vintage-soft calfskin full of retro nostalgia, paired with steel aged metal hardware. High-quality and elegant, drawstring closure design, fine ruffled edges that are 3D and playful, sophisticated yet lazy and casual. Lined with new striped canvas, with a zippered compartment. Unique design looks good on everyone.
items.name_cn:

Unique design looks good on everyone.
Model: 5BG306.
Size: 32✖️16✖️10.5
Color: Brown full leather/Original leather.

items.name_en: Includes full original retail packaging 💖 M's most special biker bag this year, featuring new vintage-soft calfskin. Classic nostalgic style, soft leather, full leather lining, multi-pocket design blurs the line between function and decoration. Distinctive personality, versatile for various styles, sweet yet edgy, great capacity. Almost everyone has one, as popular as the MiuWander.
